author_identification.canonical_name_ar: يوسف بن عبد الرحمن بن يوسف، أبو الحجاج، جمال الدين ابن الزكي أبي محمد القضاعي الكلبي المزي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent hadith scholar and biographer, known for his expertise in the science of hadith narration and his seminal work 'Tuhfat al-Ashraf'.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A collection of selected hadiths compiled by al-Mizzi, reflecting his expertise in hadith selection and narration.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Part of al-Mizzi's contributions to hadith literature, showcasing his meticulous selection and transmission of hadiths.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: The editor, أبو المنذر سامي بن أنور خليل جاهين, is known for his careful and scholarly approach to textual investigation.
scholarly_context.tahqiq_methodology_note: The edition appears to be based on a careful review of the transmission chains and textual variants, typical of modern scholarly editions.
